title: Start
body:
Stanley...
I'm upset...
But you know what would cheer me up..?
A chocolate cupcake!!
Oh but not just any chocolate cupcake, specially topped with your gorgeous vanilla essence and finished off with rainbow sprinkles!!
Could you do that?
<<Finished>><<Ask>> 
Please?

title: ReceivedCupcake
body:
Oh, Thank you Stanley! Thank you so much!
This is exactly what I needed, I'm so happy...
Lets meet again soon!
Goodbye!
<<Finished>><<Awaken>> 
End

title: TutorialTorres
body:
<<Stanley>><< SHappy>> 
Hello there, dearest Ganache Knight! 
<<Torres>><<TMiff>> 
Stanley... 
Guess now that all the children are gone, you're off to bother me aren't you?
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>
My, is that what you think of me? I'm offended, Torres!
<<STalk>> 
Actually I came here to ask you for a favour. Do you happen to have any leftover chocolate I could use?
<<Torres>><<TMiff>> 
...
Why are you asking me this? There's chocolate EVERYWHERE here!
If you're so desperate for chocolate, then go and shoot the cocoa flies. They've been bugging me for days and they always come back!
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>> 
That sounds like a plan...
<<Finished>>
<<FlyMinigame>> 
End

title: TutoAsk
body:
I really want one last cupcake for the road...
<<Finished>> 
End

title: TutoTorresComplete
body:
<<Torres>><<TTalk>> 
Hope you're satisfied.
<<Finished>> 
end

title: Torreslevel1
body:
<<Stanley>><<SHappy>>
Sorry to bother you again, Torres~
<<Torres>><<TAngry>>
YOU-!!!!!!!
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>
ME???
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>
Why is it that so many pests are attracted to this place lately?!
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>
Well, you know what they say.
The more pests there is here, the more ingredients we can get!
And this frog is perfect as melted chocolate toppings!
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>
Just get them out of here....
<<Finished>><<FrogMinigame>> 
end

title: StartLVL1
body:
...We don't want to go home.
..Father always comes back smelling... funny.
Sometimes he smells like berries... sometimes like limes...
...But when he smells like cherries...
...he gets really angry.
He shouts... and... sometimes he hits us.
We're scared he'll come home smelling like fruits again...
<<Finished>><<Ask>> 
end

title: LVL1Ask
body:
Father is scary!
<<Finished>> 
end

title: TorresLVL1Complete
body:
<<Torres>><<TTalk>> 
That should be all of it... Thanks for the hand.
<<TMiff>>
....I guess.
<<Finished>> 
end

title: KriePlatformer
body:
<<Krie>><<KTalk>>
Oh wait Stanley, come here!
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>
What is it, Your Majesty?
<<Krie>><<KHappy>>
If it's ingredients you need, then I think I have a few more around in the greenhouse here somewhere!
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>
Really?! That would be so helpful! Where can I get them?
<<Krie>><<KTalk>>
It's situated somewhere a bit dangerous, but I'm sure it'll be a piece of cupcake for a doll like you.
<<Finished>><<MinigamePlatform>> 
end

title: LVL1GoodEnding
body:
...A cupcake?
You made this... for me?
...It smells like coffee.
Mother always made coffee in the mornings. Whenever I smelled it... it meant she was awake.
She'd sit with mus before school and tell us everything was going to be okay. Even if Dad came home angry the night before...
The smell of coffee always made the house feel a little safer...
...I haven't thought about that in a long time.
...
Thank you.
Maybe... when we wake up tomorrow... we'll remember the smell of coffee instead of being scared of him.
...I think I can do that.
<<Finished>><<Awaken>> 
End

title: LVL1BadEnding
body:
...Is this for us?
A cupcake...
It looks so nice... But why does it smell like that? That sweet, fruity smell...
No...
NO!
I REMEMBER IT ALL!
Whenever father came home with that smell, I knew he wasn't himself anymore!
The whole house would become quiet... We would hide and wait until everything was over. 
I used to think that if we stayed out of his way...he would leave us alone."
But we were always scared...
WE DON'T WANT TO FEEL THAT WAY ANYMORE!
WE DON'T WANT THIS CUPCAKE!
I DON'T WANT TO REMEMBER HIM!
<<Finished>><<Awaken>> 
end

title: StartLVL2
body:
...Do I really have to wake up tomorrow?
Tomorrow is my birthday... but I don't want it to be.
Everyone says birthdays are supposed to be fun...but every year my friends tell me to close my eyes and make a wish.
...Then they push my face into the birthday cake.
They all laugh but I don't think it's funny!
The cake gets all over my face, and especially the chocolate frosting, ugh.
I don't like chocolate cake anymore! I don't even want to look at one!
I wish they would just let me have a normal birthday...
...I just wish tomorrow would never come.
<<Finished>><<Ask>> 
end

title: LVL2Ask
body:
Who needs birthdays anyways?
<<Finished>>
end

title: LVL2BadEnding
body:
...Seriously?
A chocolate cake? That's what you came up with?
Wow... amazing timing.
Everyone always thinks cake makes everything better! Like it's some kind of magic that fixes everything.
Just put a cake in front of me and suddenly I'm supposed to smile?
Are you also making fun of me Stanley?!
I don't want another reminder. I don't want another birthday cake!
...
...I don't want tomorrow to come.
<<Finished>><<Awaken>> 
end

title: LVL2GoodEnding
body:
...Wait. This isn't like the others.
It's not chocolate...
Huh.
It's vanilla and lemon flavoured?
I didn't think a cupcake could actually surprise me...
...
It tastes nice.
It's sweet... but it doesn't feel overwhelming. The lemon makes it feel different.
Is this your gift to me for my birthday, Stanley?
I guess I always thought birthdays were ruined forever. But maybe...
Maybe it wasn't the birthday that was the problem. Maybe it was just the people who made it feel that way.
...
Next time, I think I'll celebrate with people who actually care about me.
Maybe I don't need those friends around. I can celebrate with my parents instead. People who won't laugh when I'm scared.
...
I think I can look forward to my birthday again.
Thank you.
<<Finished>><<Awaken>>
end

title: KrieLVL3
body:
<<Krie>><<KAngry>> 
Oh Stanley~~ What are you doing wandering around this late? The Queen commands you to state your business!
<<Stanley>>
Your Majesty... It seems like I need one more special ingredient for our lost child. 
Would it be alright if you were to lend me-
<<Krie>><<KTalk>>
Stop right there! I know exactly what you need. But hmm it depends on whether you've been a good jester, or a greedy jester!
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>> 
[i]G-Greedy?![/i]
<<Krie>><<KThink>>
Let's see...
<<Thinking>>

title: NoLemon
body:
<<Krie>><<KHappy>> 
You've taken all my fruits from before so no more gifts for you, Mr Greedy Jester!
<<Stanley>><<SCrazy>>
W-What? 
<<SHappy>> 
Oh, but come now... Krie!!!
<<Finished>> 
End

title: YesLemon
body:
<<Krie>><<KTalk>>
Hmph, seems you still have some self-control...
<<GetLemon>> 
Just take it!
<<Stanley>><<SShock>> 
Eh? This is...
<<Finished>>
end

title: LouieStart
body:
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>
Hello?
Your Highness, are you awake?
...
.......
<<Louie>>
[color=#71d4e0]Stanley...?[/color]
[color=#71d4e0]Why are you...[/color]
[color=#71d4e0]I mean- Do you need anything?[/color]
<<Stanley>> <<SHappy>>  
Hey! I apologize for bothering you, Your Highness, but I was hoping you could help me with something.
<<STalk>> 
I'm trying to bake special cupcakes for the lost children. It seems that they won't wake up unless they are comforted so I'm doing my best!
<<Louie>> 
[color=#71d4e0]...I see.[/color]
<<Stanley>>
You had mentioned before that you have that "thing" and I thought; "What could be better in a cupcake?!"
<<Louie>> 
[color=#71d4e0]Yes, I do have one...[/color]
[color=#71d4e0]But it's fragile. If it's opened the wrong way, it won't last.[/color]
<< Stanley>> 
Don't worry~ I'll be careful with it!
<<Louie>> 
[color=#71d4e0]...You're not being very convincing...[/color]
<<Stanley>> 
Well then, how about you guide me and I'll follow? That way it's impossible for it to go wrong!
<<Louie>>
[color=#71d4e0]...![/color]
[color=#71d4e0]Well...[/color]
[color=#71d4e0]Alright... Let's do it...Come in...[/color]
[color=#71d4e0]Just remember, it's not something that can be replaced easily.[/color]
<<Stanley>>
[i]The prince's room...[/i]
<<Finished>><<Rhythm>> 
end

title: LouieBadEnd
body:
<<Louie>><<LIdle>> 
...It's spoiled.
<<Stanley>><<SShock>> 
Oh my stitches, Louie, I am so so sorry! I didn't mean for this to happen!
<<Louie>><<LWorry>> 
I-it's okay... It's not your fault.
It's just... The sight of that spoiled thing...
Please just take it, I have no use for it anymore.
<<Stanley>><<SShock>> 
Louie...
I promise I'll make it up to you!
<<Louie>><<LIdle>> 
...
Thank you...
I think I need some time alone now.
<<Finished>><<Home>> 
end

title: LouieGoodEnd
body:
<<Louie>><<LThink>> 
...You managed to keep it safe.
<<Stanley>><<SHappy>> 
I told you I could do it with your guidance!
<<Louie>>
You seem strangely confident of my abilities...
<<Stanley>><<SShock>> 
Well, of course! You're our reliable Float Prince! Why wouldn't I trust you?
<<Louie>><<LBlush>> 
...!
Oh...
I...
<<LSmile>> 
I trust in you too Stanley.
<<Stanley>><<SHappy>> 
Hehe, anyways, thanks for the ingredient! I must hurry and create the perfect cupcake for that lost child now!
<<Louie>>
Ah... Yes, see you around Stanley...
<<Finished>><<Home>> 
end
